payload.text: running template/scripts/truth-canary.sh at HEAD catches every seeded fault (ALL-CAUGHT sentinel; the suite prints its own count)

evidence.command: grep -oE 'getattr\(a, "stdin_issues"|os\.environ\.get\("TRUTH_TRACKER_CMD"\)|cmd is None and native is not None|cmd or "bd ready --json"' template/scripts/truth

payload.text: truth ready resolves its source as --stdin, then TRUTH_TRACKER_CMD, then the native work kernel when issue records exist, then bd ready --json (ADR-002 precedence)

payload.basis: recheck hash matched; independently re-ran the suite with visible output at HEAD 7c6336e (= anchor_commit): 54 caught, 0 missed, exit 0, and confirmed by reading the script that exit 0 is only reachable with FAIL=0, so the ALL-CAUGHT wrapper sentinel does encode zero missed faults

recheck hash matched; independently traced tracker_issues() branch logic in template/scripts/truth:984-990 and cmd_ready:1012 (stdin short-circuit, env-var-beats-native via 'cmd is None and native is not None', native only when fold_issues non-empty, bd default) and confirmed ADR-002 lines 118-120 state this exact precedence
